SEARCH
Package com.ju57a7ouc4n.phishlab.model.dao

Class DatabaseManager

java.lang.Object
com.ju57a7ouc4n.phishlab.model.dao.DatabaseManager
public class DatabaseManager extends Object
Utility class responsible for managing the JDBC connection to the local SQLite database. Handles the creation of the database file and the initialization of the required tables. This class uses static methods to provide a global connection point for the application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ju57a7ouc4n

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static DatabaseManager getInstance()

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Establishes and returns a new active connection to the SQLite local file. The caller is responsible for closing the connection after use to prevent memory leaks.
      Returns:
      A valid, open Connection object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database access error occurs or the driver is not found.

    • initializeDatabase

      public void initializeDatabase()

    • insertRule

      public boolean insertRule(Rule rule)
      Persists a new Rule object into the database. Uses a PreparedStatement to safely bind the entity's attributes to the SQL query, preventing SQL injection attacks.
      Parameters:
      rule - The fully populated Rule entity to be inserted.
      Returns:
      true if the insertion was successful, false if a database error occurred or if a unique constraint was violated.

    • findRuleByIndicator

      public Rule findRuleByIndicator(String indicator)
      Queries the database to find an existing rule that matches the specified indicator. If a match is found, it maps the SQL ResultSet row back into a Java Rule entity.
      Parameters:
      indicator - The exact URL, domain, or IP address to search for.
      Returns:
      A fully populated Rule object if a match is found; null otherwise.

    • addErrorListener

      public void addErrorListener(ErrorListener listener)

    • notifyError

      public void notifyError(String title, String message, Exception e)
